posts.headline: CHA CHING
posts.description: Yum cha + cocktails in the CBD
posts.fullCaption:
Book Cha Ching for your next group dinner.

Yum cha, cocktails and Asian-fusion share plates in the CBD.

Why go:
• Yum cha + cocktail energy
• Great for group dinners and city catch-ups
• Book ahead — it gets busy

Save this for your next Melbourne food night.

📍 https://maps.google.com/?cid=15116040731015528848
